texto: When every church becomes a school, every cathedral a university, every clergyman a teacher, and all their hearers brave and honest thinkers, then - and not until then - will the dream of poet, patriot, philanthropist and philosopher become a real and blessed truth.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Green Ingersoll sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When every church becomes a school, every cathedral a university, every clergyman a teacher, and …” articula reflexao, verdade, school em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como academia e school.
